description: Surge replay fixture (001-maf-rehost, T4b). 25 signals across 5 scripted duplicate clusters. Streaming these through process_signal in mock mode must yield <=6 open incidents and >=19 attachments (Exercise 5 checkpoint). Cluster members share a strong common core phrase so the deterministic mock embedding (services/mock/embeddings.py) pushes within-cluster cosine >= DEDUP_THRESHOLD (0.83) and cross-cluster cosine below it.
